artifacts.title: Could receipt from 2024-12-27
artifacts.excerpt:
I did a calc early in the COVID pandemic: Disneyland takes in ~$20M revenue per day. so by that logic Disney could spend up to $20M to marginally reduce the length of the pandemic by _one day_

e.g. by funding vaccine research, rollout, messaging, logistics, etc

yet they did not
